name: Fighter
description: A master of martial combat, skilled with a variety of weapons and armor.

features.name: Fighting Style
features.description: You adopt a particular style of fighting as your specialty. Choose one of the options available to the fighter class.

features.name: Second Wind
features.description: You have a limited well of stamina that you can draw on to protect yourself from harm. On your turn, you can use a bonus action to regain hit points equal to 1d10 + your fighter level.

lore: Fighters learn the basics of all combat styles. Every fighter can swing an axe, fence with a rapier, wield a longsword or a greatsword, use a bow, and even trap foes in a net with some degree of skill. Likewise, a fighter is adept with shields and every form of armor.
